summary: Sprint 31 — Multisport Challenge Builder (TIMELINE + AUTOMATION + LEADERBOARD). Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All 10 criteria verified — builder loads, 3-tab system works, challenge creation/timeline/day-editor/automation/leaderboard all fully functional.

issues: When switching to LEADERBOARD tab, the left SFIDE sidebar disappears (leaderboard is a full-width view without sidebar). This is intentional by design. No functional issue.

critical_code_review_comments: INFO: builder.tsx is 768 lines — slightly over the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting DayColumn, DayEventEditor, GlobalLeaderboardChart, AutomationEngine into separate files for maintainability.
INFO: No testID attributes on interactive elements (challenge list items, tab buttons, day columns, discipline buttons, NUOVA REGOLA button). Recommend adding testIDs for future regression testing.

INFO: AUTOMATION tab requires a challenge to be selected first (no challenge selected → AutomationEngine not rendered). The tab click doesn't render the engine in the mainArea unless selectedChallenge is non-null. This is by design but could be improved with a hint state.
seed_data_creation: Several TEST_ challenges created during backend testing (TEST_IRON WEEK TEST, TEST_SCAFFOLD_7, TEST_DAYS_UPDATE, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 31 Multisport Challenge Builder is fully operational. Backend: POST /api/multisport/create (7-day scaffolding), GET /api/multisport (list), PUT /api/multisport/{id}/days (with discipline validation), PUT /api/multisport/{id}/automation (rule validation against AUTOMATION_TRIGGERS), GET /api/challenges/global-leaderboard all working correctly. Frontend builder.tsx: 3-tab system (TIMELINE/AUTOMATION/LEADERBOARD) with icons, left sidebar challenge list, new challenge form (name + days + CREA), 7-day DayColumn visual grid, DayEventEditor with 7 discipline buttons + REP TARGET + DURATA + NOTES + SALVA GIORNO, AutomationEngine with NUOVA REGOLA → R1 card with SE/ALLORA selectors + threshold input (60) + 6 triggers + 5 actions, LEADERBOARD empty state NESSUNA SFIDA ATTIVA with trophy icon. No bugs found.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found — all features working as specified.
